message:
feat(fwc): add MeshMirror artifact source kind and install repair hints

Add MeshMirror variant to ArtifactSourceKind for peer-node mirrored
packages with "mesh-mirror" tag. Add install_verify_only_repair_hints()
and install_unknown_live_repair_hints() functions, wiring repair_hints
into both verify-only and live install JSON output alongside existing
availability/readiness fields.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
